title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at BSR & Co

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at BSR & Co
jsonLd.description:
BSR & Co is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Varanasi. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSR & Co:
BSR & Co is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSR & Co!
